mapper.select: SELECT s.store_id, s.image_url, s.business_name, s.store_desc, s.addr_base, s.min_headcount, s.max_headcount, s.is_battery_supported, GROUP_CONCAT(fc.name ORDER BY fc.name SEPARATOR ',') as food_category_names FROM stores s INNER JOIN store_food_categories sfc ON s.store_id = sfc.store_id INNER JOIN food_categories fc ON sfc.food_category_id = fc.food_category_id WHERE s.store_id NOT IN ( SELECT r.store_id FROM reservations r WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status IN ( 'CONFIRMED', 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'COMPLETED' ) ) GROUP BY s.store_id ORDER BY s.store_id DESC LIMIT #{allStoreListReq.limit} OFFSET #{offset}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM stores s WHERE s.store_id NOT IN ( SELECT r.store_id FROM reservations r WHERE r.deleted_at IS NULL AND r.status IN ( 'CONFIRMED', 'PAYMENT_COMPLETED', 'COMPLETED' ) )

SELECT s.store_id, s.image_url, s.business_name, o.business_number FROM stores s INNER JOIN owners o ON s.owner_id = o.owner_id WHERE s.store_id = #{storeId} AND s.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.deleted_at IS NULL AND o.withdraw_at IS NULL
SELECT m.menu_id, m.name, m.description, m.price, m.image_url FROM menus m WHERE m.store_id = #{storeId} AND m.deleted_at IS NULL ORDER BY m.menu_id
